instruction:
A shuttle bus at the airport carries 25 passengers and passes through 9 stops. Each passenger is equally likely to get off at any one of these 9 stops, unaffected by whether other passengers get off. The shuttle bus only stops if there are passengers getting off. Let the random variable $Y$ represent the number of passengers getting off at the $i$-th stop, where $i = 1, 2, \ldots,X_{i}$ takes the value of 1 if passengers get off at that stop, otherwise it takes the value of 0. What is the variance of the number of stops $X$ the shuttle bus makes?

Options:
A. $$9\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{25}+73\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{50}$$
B. $$7\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}+72\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}-80\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{50}$$
C. $$9\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{25}+73\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}-80\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{50}$$
D. $$9\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{25}+72\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}-80\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{50}$$
E. $$9\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{25}+72\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{50}$$
F. $$8\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{25}+71\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{50}$$
G. $$8\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{25}+70\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{50}$$
H. $$9\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}+72\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{50}$$
I. $$8\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{25}+73\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{50}$$
J. $$8\times\left(\frac{6}{9}\right)^{25}+72\times\left(\frac{8}{9}\right)^{25}-81\times\left(\frac{7}{9}\right)^{50}$$
